raw.subject: Something I noticed about Southern City
raw.body:
Hi,

Your weekly specials are a great idea, keeping customers engaged with new offerings.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for people to find and remember your location.

I sketched a page idea that could showcase your menu hero, hours block, and photo gallery, giving potential customers a better sense of what you offer.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/southern-city-johnstown

Would love to discuss how a simple website can help you reach more customers in Johnstown. I work with local businesses on flat-fee web development projects.
